problem: [BUG] `output_pydantic` / `response_model` leaks into agent tool-calling loop, causing tools to be skipped on non-OpenAI LLMs. Since v1.9.0, `Task.output_pydantic` is mapped to `response_model` and passed into the agent executor's tool-calling loop. This causes the LLM to receive both `tools` and `response_format` simultaneously on every iteration.
